message:
feat(FJ-P2C-005-D2): CacheManager with persistence, eviction, and integrity verification

Unified CacheManager combining backend storage, LRU eviction, and SHA-256
integrity checking. Factory methods: in_memory(), file_backed(), and
in_memory_with_eviction(). CacheLookup enum tracks Hit/Miss/Corrupted.

4 new integration tests: hit-miss cycle, file persistence across reopen,
LRU eviction under budget, stats reflection. 25 total fj-cache tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
